title: Police Lyrics Haridas Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Police
Singer: Prabhu Pandala
Music: Vijay Antony
Movie: Haridas		 .
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words

Neranja manasu unnakkuthaan magamaayi
unna nenachuputta kedudhal ellaam sugamaagi

Maraigalum vidai sollumadi magamaayi
kannil thottiyamkulam theriyudhadi magamaayi

Uchiveyil rotila naanga
karuvaada kaayirom, police
Thoppikulla vervayila
thopparayaa nenaiyirom .. police

Ennaa vazhaka vazhurom,
ennaathuku vaazhurom
Indha policekaaran vazhkaikulla ponaa
vandi vandiya kottuthada gaana ..

College-la student ellaam
kallaeduthu adikuraan
ada busu daynu trainu daynu
oorvalaama nadathuraan

Mandhiringa varaanganu kaaka vachi
kolluraan
ada rowdy kooda enngala paathu maamaanu
solluraan

Aalunkatchi aala adjust panni ponum
adhir katchi aala ulla thooki ponum
ellaarukum sangam vachirukkaan inga
engalukku mattum oodhu raanga sanga

Police-kaaran thoppathaan
un kannukellaam theriyudhu
naanga padum kastamellaam
yaarukuda puriyudhu,..

Thirudan kooda vazhuraan
sugamaaga jeyilula
indha police kaaran pozhapu mattum
manda kaayudhu veyilula

Day n Night duty,
thitturaa pondaati
kudumbam pulla kutti
muzhikudhadaa maati

Policenu sonnaa peru romba perusu
maasa kadaisi aana
wihoutu en purseu

Uchiveyil rotila naanga
karuvaada kaayirom, police
Thoppikulla vervayila
thopparayaa nenaiyirom .. police

Ennaa vazhaka vazhurom,
ennaathuku vaazhurom
enga thuppaakiyil thoongudhada thota
thirudan kooda kaaturaaney tata..English Translation
I tried my best :)
[english lyric]

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Police'?

The song 'Police' conveys a lively and energetic vibe, celebrating the spirit of fun and camaraderie.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Haridas'?

In Haridas, the song is a vibrant number that highlights moments of joy and celebration among the characters.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Prabhu Pandala and composed by Vijay Antony.

When was 'Police' released?

'Police' was released on December 3, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Police' from the movie Haridas is a high-energy track that encapsulates the joy and excitement of celebration. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, it evokes feelings of happiness and enthusiasm, making it perfect for parties. The vibrant performance by Prabhu Pandala adds to the song's appeal, inviting listeners to dance along. Overall, it serves as a reminder of the fun moments in life, resonating with audiences looking for an upbeat experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Police from Haridas is an electrifying track that showcases Prabhu Pandala's dynamic vocals paired with Vijay Antony's vibrant music. This song captures the essence of celebration and energy, making it a perfect anthem for parties. Dive into the rhythm and let the beats take over your spirit!
stanzaMeanings: Your heart is only for me, thinking of you makes everything feel good.
Even the trees speak of you, touching my eyes reveals everything about you.
In the heat, we are working hard, police, we are thinking about the troubles in our lives... police.
We live our lives, we survive, this police officer's life is like a vehicle that keeps moving.
In college, students are getting caught, they are taking buses and trains, moving around the town.
The rowdies are coming, they are catching crows, and they say they are watching us.
People adjust and leave, while the important people take charge, everyone is gathered here, but we are just left out.
In the heat, we are working hard, police.
The police officer knows everything about your eyes, who understands all our troubles?
Even the thief lives happily, but this police officer's life is just a burden in the heat.
Day and night duty, the wife is scolding, the family is struggling with the kids.
When you say police, the name is very big, but without my purse, it's the last month.
In the heat, we are working hard, police, we are thinking about the troubles in our lives... police.
We live our lives, we survive, even the thief in our neighborhood is causing trouble.
